benefits.description: Lost ~15 lbs first month (water weight + fat), then ~10 lbs/month until ~190 lbs, now stalled at 165 lbs with BMI 22-23; starting weight was 260 lbs

protocol_notes: Started at 260 lbs, BMI 38. Titrated 5mg -> 7.5mg -> 10mg -> 12.5mg, each after only one month. Stalled at 165 lbs / BMI 22-23. Retrospectively wishes they had moved up doses more slowly — stayed on each dose until stalling rather than moving up after a month. Has a medium-to-small frame (determined by chest/wrist measurements). Used glp1plotter to track drug concentration.
